creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
smartmontools 5.42 cannot be built:

...
=> smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://freefr.dl.sourceforge.net/project/smartmontools/smartmontools/5.42/smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz
fetch: http://freefr.dl.sourceforge.net/project/smartmontools/smartmontools/5.42/smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 740025, actual 742138

Please check the distinfo file, and/or if the upstream tarball got
re-rolled (although that would require jumping a few hoops with
sourceforge.
